glossary.proposed_definition: The monetary denomination selected by a user for displaying prices and conducting transactions within the e-commerce system
Product prices adjusted and displayed according to the user's selected currency and regional location
Users who have successfully authenticated to the system with valid credentials and maintain an active session
A curated collection of products saved by a user for future reference, comparison, or purchase consideration
A temporary virtual container where users accumulate selected products before initiating the checkout process
The process where users review cart items, provide payment and shipping information, and complete a purchase transaction
Dynamic search query predictions that appear as users type, based on product names, categories, and historical search patterns
Logical groupings of products organized by type (e.g., Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, Gift Cards) for navigation and discovery
Visual elements displayed on the homepage highlighting featured products, special offers, or marketing campaigns
Products selected for promotional visibility on the homepage due to sales performance, new releases, or marketing initiatives
Visual representations of products displayed in listing and detail pages to enable user recognition and evaluation
Text-based information detailing product features, specifications, benefits, and other relevant details for purchase decisions
Distinct areas on the homepage organizing product displays by type or category for improved navigation
Individual web pages containing comprehensive product information, specifications, reviews, pricing, and purchase options
An interactive UI element on promotional banners that directs users to detailed product pages for additional information
A navigational element providing access to user guides, FAQs, and platform documentation resources
Help resources including step-by-step instructional materials and frequently asked questions addressing common user concerns
The e-commerce system encompassing all functional and user-facing features for product discovery, selection, and purchase
Individual profiles storing user credentials, personal information, purchase history, and preferences within the system
Using encryption, authentication protocols, and security best practices to protect user data and prevent unauthorized access

features.business_story: As a user from a different country, I want to select my preferred currency from a dropdown menu, so that I can see prices in a format familiar to me.
As a customer, I want to register, log in, and manage my account securely, so that my personal and payment information remains protected.
features.action: register, log in, and manage accounts

features.business_story: As a logged-in user, I want to add items to a wishlist, so that I can save products for future reference and potential purchase.
As a user, I want to add, update, and remove products in a shopping cart, so that I can manage my purchases before completing checkout.
As a user, I want to search for products using a search bar with autocomplete suggestions, so that I can quickly find the items I'm looking for.
As a user, I want to see main product categories displayed (Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, Gift Cards), so that I can easily navigate and browse products by type.
As a visitor, I want to see promotional banners on the homepage highlighting featured products and offers, so that I'm immediately aware of current deals and promotions.
features.benefit: immediate awareness of deals and offers

features.business_story: As a user, I want to see product images, descriptions, and prices in categorized sections on the homepage, so that I can quickly evaluate products without deep navigation.
As a user viewing promotional banners, I want a 'Learn More' button that redirects me to detailed product pages, so that I can quickly access complete product information.
As a user, I want to access a documentation link for guides and FAQs about the platform, so that I can quickly resolve questions and learn how to use the system effectively.
features.benefit: learn platform usage and resolve questions

scenarios.scenario_name: User selects preferred currency from dropdown
scenarios.given: A user is on the homepage and has not yet selected a currency preference
scenarios.when: The user clicks on the currency dropdown menu and selects their preferred currency (e.g., EUR, GBP, JPY)
scenarios.then: The system displays all prices in the selected currency and persists this preference for future sessions

scenarios.scenario_name: User registers with valid credentials
scenarios.given: A new user accesses the registration page
scenarios.when: The user enters valid email, password, and confirms password, then submits the registration form
scenarios.then: The system creates a secure user account and displays a confirmation message

scenarios.scenario_name: Existing user logs in with correct credentials
scenarios.given: A registered user is on the login page
scenarios.when: The user enters their email and correct password, then submits the login form
scenarios.then: The system authenticates the user and grants access to their account dashboard

scenarios.scenario_name: User attempts to log in with incorrect password
scenarios.given: A registered user is on the login page
scenarios.when: The user enters their email and an incorrect password, then submits the login form
scenarios.then: The system displays an error message and does not grant access

scenarios.scenario_name: User adds item to wishlist
scenarios.given: A logged-in user is viewing a product detail page
scenarios.when: The user clicks the 'Add to Wishlist' button
scenarios.then: The system adds the product to the user's wishlist and displays a confirmation message

scenarios.scenario_name: Non-logged-in user attempts to add to wishlist
scenarios.given: A non-logged-in user is viewing a product detail page
scenarios.when: The user clicks the 'Add to Wishlist' button
scenarios.then: The system redirects the user to the login page or displays a message to log in first

scenarios.scenario_name: User adds product to shopping cart
scenarios.given: A user is viewing a product and the shopping cart is empty
scenarios.when: The user selects a quantity and clicks 'Add to Cart'
scenarios.then: The system adds the product with the specified quantity to the shopping cart and updates the cart count

scenarios.scenario_name: User updates quantity in shopping cart
scenarios.given: A user has a product in their shopping cart
scenarios.when: The user changes the quantity field and clicks 'Update Cart'
scenarios.then: The system updates the product quantity and recalculates the cart total

scenarios.scenario_name: User removes product from shopping cart
scenarios.given: A user has multiple products in their shopping cart
scenarios.when: The user clicks the 'Remove' button next to a product
scenarios.then: The system removes the product from the cart and updates the cart total

scenarios.scenario_name: User attempts to add out-of-stock quantity to cart
scenarios.given: A product has limited stock (e.g., 3 units available)
scenarios.when: The user enters a quantity greater than available stock (e.g., 5) and attempts to add to cart
scenarios.then: The system displays an error message and prevents the addition

scenarios.scenario_name: User searches for product with autocomplete
scenarios.given: A user is on the homepage and the search bar is visible
scenarios.when: The user types 'laptop' in the search bar
scenarios.then: The system displays autocomplete suggestions matching products and search history (e.g., 'laptop stand', 'laptop bag', 'laptop pro')

scenarios.scenario_name: User searches for non-existent product
scenarios.given: A user has entered a search query that matches no products
scenarios.when: The user presses Enter or clicks the search button
scenarios.then: The system displays a 'No products found' message and suggests related searches or categories

scenarios.scenario_name: User browses product categories
scenarios.given: A user is on the homepage
scenarios.when: The user views the product categories section
scenarios.then: The system displays all main categories (Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, Gift Cards)

scenarios.scenario_name: User clicks on a product category
scenarios.given: A user is viewing the product categories on the homepage
scenarios.when: The user clicks on the 'Computers' category
scenarios.then: The system navigates to a category page displaying all products in that category

scenarios.scenario_name: User views promotional banners on homepage
scenarios.given: A new visitor arrives at the homepage
scenarios.when: The page loads
scenarios.then: The system displays promotional banners highlighting featured products and current offers

scenarios.scenario_name: Multiple promotional banners are displayed
scenarios.given: The homepage is loaded with multiple promotional campaigns active
scenarios.when: The user views the banner section
scenarios.then: The system displays all promotional banners in rotation or side-by-side layout without breaking the layout

scenarios.scenario_name: User views product listings with images and descriptions
scenarios.given: A user is on the homepage
scenarios.when: The page loads the product listings section
scenarios.then: The system displays product images, descriptions, and prices organized in categorized sections

scenarios.scenario_name: Product image fails to load in listing
scenarios.given: A product image URL is broken or the server is unavailable
scenarios.when: The product listing attempts to display the image
scenarios.then: The system displays a placeholder image and allows the user to still view product name, description, and price

scenarios.scenario_name: User clicks Learn More button on promotional banner
scenarios.given: A user is viewing a promotional banner on the homepage
scenarios.when: The user clicks the 'Learn More' button
scenarios.then: The system redirects the user to the detailed product page for that product

scenarios.scenario_name: Learn More button target product page is unavailable
scenarios.given: A promotional banner's target product page has been deleted or moved
scenarios.when: The user clicks the 'Learn More' button
scenarios.then: The system displays a 404 error or redirects to the product category page

scenarios.scenario_name: User accesses online documentation
scenarios.given: A user is on any page of the platform
scenarios.when: The user clicks the documentation link (typically in footer or help menu)
scenarios.then: The system opens a documentation page with guides, FAQs, and help resources

scenarios.scenario_name: User searches within FAQ documentation
scenarios.given: A user is on the documentation page
scenarios.when: The user enters a search query in the FAQ search field
scenarios.then: The system displays relevant FAQs and guides matching the search terms

business_stories.business_story: As a user from a different country, I want to select my preferred currency from a dropdown menu, so that I can see prices in a format familiar to me.
As a customer, I want to register, log in, and manage my account securely, so that my personal and payment information remains protected.
As a logged-in user, I want to add items to a wishlist, so that I can save products for future reference and potential purchase.
As a user, I want to add, update, and remove products in a shopping cart, so that I can manage my purchases before completing checkout.
As a user, I want to search for products using a search bar with autocomplete suggestions, so that I can quickly find the items I'm looking for.
As a user, I want to see main product categories displayed (Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, Gift Cards), so that I can easily navigate and browse products by type.
As a visitor, I want to see promotional banners on the homepage highlighting featured products and offers, so that I'm immediately aware of current deals and promotions.
As a user, I want to see product images, descriptions, and prices in categorized sections on the homepage, so that I can quickly evaluate products without deep navigation.
As a user viewing promotional banners, I want a 'Learn More' button that redirects me to detailed product pages, so that I can quickly access complete product information.
As a user, I want to access a documentation link for guides and FAQs about the platform, so that I can quickly resolve questions and learn how to use the system effectively.

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous Definition of 'Localized Pricing'
findings.detail: REQ001 uses 'localized pricing' but lacks clarity on scope. It could mean currency conversion only, or could include regional taxes, shipping adjustments, and regional discount adjustments.
findings.recommendation: Clarify whether 'localized pricing' includes only currency conversion or also incorporates regional taxes, shipping costs, and location-based pricing adjustments. Add business rule specifying which pricing factors are applied.

findings.finding_title: Undefined 'Securely' in Authentication Context
findings.detail: REQ002 uses 'securely' without defining specific security measures or standards. This is ambiguous as it could mean basic password protection or require advanced security practices like multi-factor authentication.
findings.recommendation: Define specific security requirements such as minimum password complexity, encryption standards (TLS 1.2+), hashing algorithms (bcrypt, PBKDF2), and whether multi-factor authentication is mandatory.

findings.finding_title: Undefined 'Autocomplete Suggestions' Scope
findings.detail: REQ005 specifies autocomplete suggestions without defining the source data or matching logic. It is unclear whether suggestions are based on product catalog only, user's search history, popular searches across all users, or a combination.
findings.recommendation: Specify the data sources for autocomplete (product names, categories, user history, trending searches), the matching algorithm, maximum number of suggestions displayed, and the order/ranking of results.

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous 'Featured Products' Definition
findings.detail: REQ007 references 'featured products' without defining selection criteria or business rules. It is unclear whether featured products are manually selected, algorithmically determined, or based on business objectives.
findings.recommendation: Define the criteria for selecting featured products: manual curation by administrators, algorithmic ranking (trending, new, high-margin), rotation frequency, and maximum number of concurrent featured products displayed.

findings.finding_title: Missing Business Rule for Product Display Content
findings.detail: REQ008 specifies what to display but does not define business rules around content completeness, quality standards, or fallback behavior. For example: what happens if a product lacks an image or description?
findings.recommendation: Define business rules for product display: minimum content requirements (e.g., all products must have at least one image and description), handling of missing data, pricing display format (original vs. sale price), and inventory status indicators.

findings.finding_title: Undefined 'Learn More' Navigation Behavior
findings.detail: REQ009 defines the button's action (redirect to product page) but does not clarify which product page is targeted. If a banner promotes multiple products or a category, it is unclear whether the button routes to a specific product, a category page, or search results.
findings.recommendation: Clarify the navigation logic: if a banner promotes a single product, specify that the button links directly to that product's detail page. If a banner promotes multiple products or a category, specify whether it links to category view, search results, or a curated collection page.

findings.finding_title: Payment Processing Missing
findings.detail: The requirements describe a complete e-commerce system with shopping carts, product browsing, and user authentication, but there is no explicit requirement for payment processing or checkout functionality.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit requirements for payment gateway integration, payment method selection, and secure transaction processing.

findings.finding_title: Order Management System Missing
findings.detail: While the system supports user registration and shopping carts, there is no requirement for order management, order history, or order status tracking.
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for order confirmation, order history display, order status tracking, and customer service integration.

findings.finding_title: Product Reviews and Ratings Missing
findings.detail: The requirements describe product listings with images and descriptions, but do not include mechanisms for customer feedback like reviews and ratings.
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for customer review submission, rating system, review moderation, and display of reviews on product detail pages.

findings.finding_title: Product Filtering and Sorting Missing
findings.detail: While product categories and search functionality are defined, there is no explicit requirement for filtering and sorting capabilities within categories or search results.
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for price range filters, attribute-based filtering, and sorting options (price, popularity, newest, etc.).

findings.finding_title: Inventory Management Missing
findings.detail: The requirements focus on customer-facing features but lack any mention of inventory management, stock tracking, or out-of-stock handling.
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for inventory tracking, stock level management, back-order handling, and low-stock alerts.

findings.finding_title: Shipping and Delivery Management Missing
findings.detail: The requirements describe purchase functionality but omit shipping options, delivery address management, and tracking.
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for shipping method selection, shipping cost calculation, delivery address management, and shipment tracking.

findings.finding_title: Search Functionality May Need Decomposition
findings.detail: REQ005 combines multiple functional components: search bar input, autocomplete suggestions, and result delivery. These should be treated as separate features.
findings.recommendation: Decompose into: Search Bar Input, Autocomplete Engine, and Search Results Display. Define data sources for autocomplete and search algorithms.

findings.finding_title: Homepage Banner and Learn More Button Overlap
findings.detail: REQ007 (Homepage Banner) and REQ009 (Learn More Button) are tightly coupled components. The Learn More button is a sub-component of the banner feature rather than a standalone feature.

findings.finding_title: Discount and Promotion Management Missing
findings.detail: While promotional banners are displayed, there is no requirement for managing discounts, promo codes, or promotion rules.
findings.recommendation: Add requirements for discount code management, promotion rule configuration, pricing adjustments, and promotional campaign tracking.

findings.finding_title: User Account Management May Need Decomposition
findings.detail: REQ002 combines three distinct operations: user registration, login, and account management. These represent different user flows.

findings.finding_title: REQ002 - User Authentication Outcome: Secure Account Management
findings.detail: Users achieve secure access to personal and payment information through account registration, login, and management capabilities.
findings.recommendation: Implement observable metrics to verify outcome: track account creation, successful login rates, and data access logs to confirm secure information protection

findings.finding_title: REQ003 - Wishlist Feature Outcome: Product Curation for Future Consideration
findings.detail: Logged-in users achieve persistent product curation by saving items to a wishlist for future reference and comparison.
findings.recommendation: Measure outcome success by tracking wishlist creation rates, item additions, and frequency of wishlist review

findings.finding_title: REQ004 - Shopping Cart Outcome: Purchase Preparation Control
findings.detail: Users achieve control over purchase composition by adding, updating, and removing products in a shopping cart before transaction completion.
findings.recommendation: Track cart abandonment rates, average items per cart, and modification frequencies to validate purchase management outcome

findings.finding_title: REQ005 - Search Functionality Outcome: Accelerated Product Discovery
findings.detail: Users achieve faster product discovery through search bar with autocomplete suggestions reducing navigation friction.
findings.recommendation: Measure outcome effectiveness through search completion rates, time-to-first-result metrics, and autocomplete suggestion acceptance rates

findings.finding_title: REQ006 - Product Categories Outcome: Organized Navigation Experience
findings.detail: Users achieve efficient product discovery through organized category structure (Computers, Electronics, Apparel, Digital Downloads, Books, Jewelry, Gift Cards).
findings.recommendation: Validate outcome achievement by monitoring category page visit patterns and tracking product location success

findings.finding_title: REQ007 - Homepage Banner Outcome: Promotional Awareness and Engagement
findings.detail: Visitors achieve awareness of current promotions and featured products through homepage banner display.
findings.recommendation: Track banner impression rates, click-through rates, and influence on product selection to confirm promotion awareness outcome

findings.finding_title: REQ008 - Product Listings Outcome: Informed Evaluation Without Deep Navigation
findings.detail: Users achieve informed product evaluation through immediate access to images, descriptions, and prices in categorized homepage sections.
findings.recommendation: Measure outcome success by tracking homepage time-to-evaluation metrics and conversion rate comparisons

findings.finding_title: REQ009 - Learn More Button Outcome: Facilitated Detailed Product Information Access
findings.detail: Users achieve quick access to comprehensive product information by clicking 'Learn More' button from promotional banners.
findings.recommendation: Track button click rates, page load times after clicks, and user engagement on destination product pages

findings.finding_title: REQ010 - Online Documentation Outcome: Self-Service Platform Learning
findings.detail: Users achieve independent platform mastery through access to guides and FAQs addressing common usage questions.
findings.recommendation: Monitor documentation access frequency, FAQ topic popularity, and track whether users show improved task completion rates

findings.finding_title: REQ001 - Currency Selection Outcome: Localized Pricing Perception
findings.detail: Users from different countries achieve familiar price presentation and transaction understanding through currency selection dropdown.
findings.recommendation: Track currency selection patterns and compare conversion rates across currency selections to confirm perception improvement

findings.finding_title: Security implementation not specified for authentication
findings.detail: REQ002 states 'securely' but lacks implementation details. The glossary defines 'securely' but no scenarios specify which encryption algorithms, session timeouts, or account lockout mechanisms should be implemented.
findings.recommendation: Add specific scenarios detailing password encryption methods, HTTPS enforcement, session timeout periods, and account lockout mechanisms after failed login attempts.

findings.finding_title: Currency conversion logic not defined
findings.detail: REQ001 requires displaying prices in selected currency but doesn't specify how conversion should occur. Exchange rate accuracy, update frequency, and rounding behavior are unclear.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios specifying exchange rate source (e.g., live API), update frequency (e.g., hourly), rounding rules (e.g., banker's rounding), and fallback behavior.

findings.finding_title: Autocomplete source and freshness not specified
findings.detail: REQ005 mentions 'autocomplete suggestions' but no scenarios define which sources to prioritize, the threshold for displaying suggestions, or performance constraints.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios specifying minimum character threshold (e.g., 2-3 chars), suggestion sources ranking, maximum suggestions (e.g., 10), and real-time vs. indexed data approach.

findings.finding_title: Wishlist persistence and capacity not defined
findings.detail: REQ003 requires adding items to wishlist but doesn't specify capacity limits, persistence duration, or sharing capabilities.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios defining maximum wishlist capacity, persistence period (e.g., indefinite or 12 months), sharing capabilities, and removal policies.

findings.finding_title: Shopping cart session timeout not specified
findings.detail: REQ004 requires cart management but doesn't specify session timeout, whether cart persists for non-logged-in users, or how to handle inventory changes.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios defining cart persistence (indefinite for logged-in, 30 days for guests), stock validation before checkout, and price refresh on cart view.

findings.finding_title: Banner rotation and display rules not specified
findings.detail: REQ007 requires displaying promotional banners but doesn't specify layout (carousel vs static), rotation speed, or responsive behavior.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios specifying banner display mode (e.g., carousel rotating every 5 seconds), mobile behavior (e.g., vertical stack), and banner priority algorithm.

findings.finding_title: Product image optimization not addressed
findings.detail: REQ008 requires displaying product images but doesn't specify optimization techniques. Large product listings could cause performance issues.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios requiring lazy loading on scroll, responsive image formats, and CDN-based delivery.

findings.finding_title: Category pagination not specified
findings.detail: REQ006 requires displaying categories but doesn't specify how large product lists are handled. Categories could have thousands of items.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios defining items per page (e.g., 20), pagination type (traditional or infinite scroll), sorting options, and available filters.

findings.finding_title: Documentation search not functional in current design
findings.detail: REQ010 mentions 'documentation link' and 'guides and FAQs' but doesn't specify a searchable documentation feature. This creates a gap between user expectation and specification.
findings.recommendation: Clarify if documentation should be searchable. If yes, add scenarios for search indexing, full-text search, and result ranking.

findings.finding_title: Integration gap between wishlist and shopping cart
findings.detail: REQ003 and REQ004 are separate but users naturally move items between wishlist and cart. Current requirements don't specify interaction scenarios.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios for moving items from wishlist to cart, bulk selection, and price history tracking for wishlist items.

findings.finding_title: Account session management not defined
findings.detail: REQ002 requires secure authentication but doesn't address session management policies. Lack of inactivity timeout, remember-me options, and concurrent session limits creates security ambiguity.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios defining inactivity timeout (recommend 30-60 minutes), remember-me duration (7-30 days), maximum concurrent sessions, and logout policies.

findings.finding_title: Undefined security implementation standards in user authentication
findings.detail: The term 'securely' is vague and unverified. Different teams may implement different security standards. Without specific security requirements (encryption types, authentication methods, compliance standards), the requirement lacks enforceability.
findings.recommendation: Replace 'securely' with explicit security requirements: 'The system shall use TLS 1.3 for data transmission, bcrypt for password hashing with salt, and support multi-factor authentication (MFA).'

findings.finding_title: Ambiguous scope of 'localized pricing' regarding currency conversion
findings.detail: REQ001 combines two potentially independent concerns: currency selection and localized pricing. The definition doesn't clarify whether prices are dynamically converted or if different price tiers exist per region.
findings.recommendation: Separate concerns: 'REQ001a - Currency selection from dropdown. REQ001b - Display product prices in selected currency using [specify: real-time exchange rates/static regional pricing/hybrid approach].'

findings.finding_title: Vague quantifier for promotional banner content and frequency
findings.detail: REQ007 uses 'promotional banners' (plural) but does not specify: (1) how many banners should be displayed, (2) whether they appear simultaneously or sequentially, (3) update frequency, or (4) priority/selection logic.
findings.recommendation: Specify quantifiers: 'The system shall display between 3 and 5 promotional banners simultaneously on the homepage, rotating featured products and offers every 24 hours.'

findings.finding_title: Undefined scope and structure of product listings on homepage
findings.detail: REQ008 does not specify: (1) how many products to display per category, (2) whether pagination is required, (3) which products qualify for homepage display (all vs. featured), or (4) the sorting/prioritization logic.
findings.recommendation: Clarify product display scope: 'The system shall display [number] featured products per category in categorized sections on the homepage, sorted by [criteria].'

findings.finding_title: Incomplete specification of autocomplete suggestions behavior and source data
findings.detail: REQ005 does not specify which data sources feed the autocomplete engine or clarify whether this includes cross-user patterns. The minimum number of suggestions and trigger conditions are undefined.
findings.recommendation: Specify autocomplete behavior: 'The system shall display autocomplete suggestions after user enters [number] characters, based on [specify sources]. Display maximum [number] suggestions ranked by [criteria].'

findings.finding_title: REQ001 - Currency Selection Persistence: Unpredictable Storage Behavior
findings.detail: REQ001 specifies the selection mechanism and display, but Sophia's scenario adds persistence behavior not in the requirement. The requirement says nothing about storage duration, user profiles, cookies, or session management.
findings.recommendation: Clarify REQ001 to explicitly state whether currency preference persists across sessions, and if so, clarify the persistence mechanism: user account-based, browser-based, or session-only.

findings.finding_title: REQ003 - Wishlist Non-Logged-In Access: Incomplete Authentication Boundary
findings.detail: REQ003 states 'The system shall allow logged-in users to add items to a wishlist.' This explicitly scopes to authenticated users only, but does not specify what happens when non-logged-in user attempts to interact.
findings.recommendation: Extend REQ003 to include explicit handling of non-authenticated access attempts. Specify: (1) Whether wishlist UI should be hidden, disabled, or interactive, (2) What message or action results from attempts, and (3) Whether authentication state changes preserve the user's intended action.

findings.finding_title: REQ004 - Out-of-Stock Cart Addition: Missing Inventory Validation Rule
findings.detail: REQ004 specifies cart mechanics but does not address inventory constraints, stock validation, or behavior when requested quantity exceeds availability. This represents a critical missing default behavior.
findings.recommendation: Add requirement to specify inventory validation rules: (1) Define maximum cart quantity constraints relative to stock, (2) Specify system response when quantity exceeds availability, and (3) Clarify whether quantity constraints are enforced at add time, update time, or both.

findings.finding_title: REQ008 - Product Image Failure: Missing Graceful Degradation Rule
findings.detail: REQ008 requires displaying product images but does not specify fallback behavior when images cannot be retrieved. The requirement provides no guidance on image loading failures or degradation strategy.
findings.recommendation: Extend REQ008 to include image availability handling: (1) Specify a fallback visual treatment (placeholder image, default icon), (2) Clarify that product availability remains independent of image load success, and (3) Define error logging for image delivery failures.

findings.finding_title: REQ009 - Learn More Button Broken Link: Missing Error Handling Specification
findings.detail: REQ009 specifies the button mechanism and normal behavior (redirect) but does not address error conditions where the target product page no longer exists, has been moved, or is inaccessible.
findings.recommendation: Extend REQ009 to include link validation and error handling: (1) Specify whether banner links should be pre-validated before display, (2) Define the user experience when a product page is unavailable (404 page, category fallback, search suggestions), and (3) Clarify relationship between promotional banner lifecycle and product availability.

findings.finding_title: REQ007 - Multiple Promotional Banners Layout: Unpredictable Rendering Behavior
findings.detail: REQ007 specifies 'promotional banners' (plural) but does not specify multi-banner scenarios, layout rules, display order, or rendering constraints. Responsive design and space constraints are assumed but unspecified.
findings.recommendation: Clarify REQ007 to specify multi-banner display rules: (1) Define maximum number of simultaneous banners, (2) Specify banner display strategy (rotation, side-by-side, carousel), (3) Specify responsive behavior for mobile vs. desktop, and (4) Define layout constraints to prevent content displacement.

findings.finding_title: Payment Gateway Integration Completely Missing
findings.detail: All requirements describe customer-facing shopping features but REQ001-REQ010 contain no explicit payment requirement. A functional e-commerce system requires this capability; its absence represents a critical architectural gap.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ011 - F11_Payment Processing: The system shall support secure payment processing through integration with a payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, PayPal).'

findings.finding_title: Order Management and History System Missing
findings.detail: No requirement addresses what happens after transaction completion, which is essential for customer satisfaction and operational support.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ012 - F12_Order Management: The system shall provide functionality for users to view order history, track order status, receive order confirmations, and manage existing orders.'

findings.finding_title: Shipping and Delivery Management Missing
findings.detail: Glossary definition of 'checkout' includes shipping information, but no requirement specifies shipping feature. Without shipping management, physical fulfillment cannot be completed.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ013 - F13_Shipping and Delivery: The system shall allow users to enter shipping addresses, select from available shipping methods, and track shipment status.'

findings.finding_title: Inventory Management System Missing
findings.detail: Sophia's scenarios show inventory edge cases indicating inventory is expected, but no requirement explicitly defines inventory management.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ014 - F14_Inventory Management: The system shall track product inventory, prevent purchases exceeding available stock, update inventory on transaction, and provide administrative tools.'

findings.finding_title: Product Reviews and Ratings System Missing
findings.detail: REQ008 specifies product descriptions but doesn't include reviews and ratings. Modern e-commerce platforms include reviews as a standard feature.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ015 - F15_Product Reviews and Ratings: The system shall allow logged-in customers to submit product reviews with ratings.'

findings.finding_title: Product Filtering and Sorting Missing
findings.detail: REQ005 and REQ006 enable product discovery but don't include filtering/sorting capabilities. These are essential for usable product discovery.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ016 - F16_Product Filtering and Sorting: The system shall provide price range filters, attribute-based filters, and sorting options.'

findings.finding_title: Discount and Promotional Code Management Missing
findings.detail: REQ007 references 'featured products and offers' but provides no mechanism to define, manage, or apply discounts.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'REQ017 - F17_Discount and Promotion Management: The system shall support promotional discount codes with validation rules.'

findings.finding_title: Password Reset and Account Recovery Missing
findings.detail: REQ002 requires account management but doesn't specify password reset or recovery. This is a critical security and usability feature.
findings.recommendation: Add requirement clarification to REQ002 or new requirement specifying password reset functionality via email verification.

findings.finding_title: Accessibility Requirements (WCAG Compliance) Not Defined
findings.detail: None of the 10 requirements mention accessibility. This is a critical compliance and ethical requirement for modern web applications.
findings.recommendation: Add new non-functional requirement: 'The system shall comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility standards, including keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility.'

findings.finding_title: Performance and Load Time Requirements Not Specified
findings.detail: No performance targets exist. System may suffer from poor response times; unclear scalability limits.
findings.recommendation: Add non-functional requirement: 'The system shall load homepage in under 2 seconds, display search results within 500ms.'

findings.finding_title: Mobile Responsiveness Requirements Not Defined
findings.detail: No requirement addresses mobile devices. E-commerce primarily occurs on mobile; absence of mobile requirements is critical.
findings.recommendation: Add non-functional requirement: 'The system shall be fully responsive and mobile-optimized, supporting iOS and Android devices.'

findings.finding_title: Internationalization Beyond Currency Not Specified
findings.detail: REQ001 enables currency selection suggesting international users, but no language or localization requirement exists.
findings.recommendation: Add non-functional requirement: 'The system shall support multiple languages with complete UI translation, locale-specific tax calculation.'

findings.finding_title: Error Handling and User Feedback Strategy Not Defined
findings.detail: No systematic error handling requirement exists. This creates inconsistent user experience across the platform.
findings.recommendation: Add non-functional requirement: 'The system shall provide clear, actionable error messages in user language, log all errors for monitoring, and handle failures gracefully.'

findings.finding_title: Data Security and Compliance Standards Not Specified
findings.detail: No specific security standards, compliance frameworks, or implementation details are defined despite handling sensitive payment and personal data.
findings.recommendation: Add non-functional security requirement: 'The system shall comply with PCI-DSS for payment data, GDPR for personal data, use TLS 1.3.'

findings.finding_title: Session Management Policies Completely Undefined
findings.detail: REQ002 requires secure authentication but doesn't address session management policies. Lack of inactivity timeout, remember-me options creates security/UX conflicts.
findings.recommendation: Add scenarios defining: inactivity timeout (30-60 minutes), remember-me duration (7-30 days), maximum concurrent sessions.

findings.finding_title: Shopping Cart Persistence Rules Not Defined
findings.detail: REQ004 describes cart operations but not persistence or recovery behavior, creating poor UX for cart abandonment.
findings.recommendation: Define: 'Logged-in users' carts persist indefinitely. Guest carts persist for 30 days. On cart view, validate stock and refresh prices.'

findings.finding_title: Currency Conversion Logic and Exchange Rate Handling Not Defined
findings.detail: REQ001 implementation details are missing. No specification of exchange rate source, update frequency, conversion timing, rounding rules, or fallback behavior.
findings.recommendation: Specify: 'Use live exchange rate API updated hourly. Apply conversion at checkout. Use banker's rounding. Fall back to previous rate if API unavailable.'

findings.finding_title: Contact/Support and Help Functionality Missing
findings.detail: REQ010 provides documentation but no direct support channel. Modern e-commerce requires multiple support mechanisms.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'The system shall provide a contact form, email support channel, and integration with customer support ticketing system.'

findings.finding_title: Refund and Return Management Missing
findings.detail: No mechanism for customers to return products; unclear refund process. Return/refund management is required by consumer protection laws.
findings.recommendation: Add new requirement: 'The system shall support customer-initiated return requests with automated RMA generation and refund processing.'

findings.finding_title: User Profile Management and Preferences Not Defined
findings.detail: REQ002 mentions 'manage their accounts' but doesn't specify what account management includes. Profile and preference management is essential but undefined.
findings.recommendation: Expand REQ002 or create new requirement specifying profile update capability, multiple address management, saved payment methods, and privacy controls.

findings.finding_title: Product Detail Page Requirements Not Specified
findings.detail: REQ009 mentions 'detailed product pages' but never defines what constitutes a product detail page. Dorothy glossary defines it but requirements don't specify content.
findings.recommendation: Add requirement: 'The system shall display detailed product pages including full description, specifications, image gallery, customer reviews/ratings.'

findings.finding_title: Pagination and Result Navigation for Large Product Sets Not Specified
findings.detail: No requirement defines pagination strategy for categories and search results when dealing with large product sets.
findings.recommendation: Specify pagination approach: 'Display 20 products per page with traditional pagination controls. Support sorting/filtering persistence.'

findings.finding_title: Browser and Device Compatibility Requirements Not Specified
findings.detail: No requirement addresses browser or device compatibility. Unclear which browsers/devices are supported.
findings.recommendation: Add non-functional requirement: 'The system shall support current versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Support iOS Safari and Android Chrome.'

D.finding_title: Missing Business Rule for Product Display Content

F.finding_title: Homepage Banner and Learn More Button Overlap

Autocomplete source and freshness not specified
Wishlist persistence and capacity not defined
Shopping cart session timeout not specified
Banner rotation and display rules not specified
Documentation search not functional in current design
Integration gap between wishlist and shopping cart

Ambiguous scope of 'localized pricing' regarding currency conversion
Vague quantifier for promotional banner content and frequency
Undefined scope and structure of product listings on homepage
Incomplete specification of autocomplete suggestions behavior
